mapper.select: select d.dept_seq as deptSeq, d.dept_code as deptCode, d.dept_name as deptName, u.sysname as sysname, d.parent_dept_seq as parentDeptSeq, u.name as name, r.rank_name as position from departments d left join ( select u1.dept_seq, u1.name, u1.rank_seq, u1.sysname from users u1 where u1.users_seq in (select min(u2.users_seq) from users u2 group by u2.dept_seq) ) u on d.dept_seq = u.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq order by d.dept_seq

select u.id as id, u.name as name, u.dept_seq as deptSeq, d.dept_code as deptCode, d.dept_name as deptName, u.sysname as sysname, r.rank_name as position, u.phone, case when a.check_out is not null then '퇴근' when a.check_in is not null then '근무중' else '연차' end as attendanceStatus from users u left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq left join attendance a on u.id = a.users_id and trunc(a.work_date) = trunc(sysdate)
order by r.rank_order asc, u.name asc
select u.id as id, u.name as name, r.rank_name as position, u.sysname as sysname from users u left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq where u.dept_seq = #{deptSeq} order by r.rank_order
